VOXCHRONICLE.Title: [EN] VoxChronicle
VOXCHRONICLE.Description: [EN] Auto-transcribe RPG sessions and publish chronicles to Kanka with AI-generated content and portraits.

Settings.OpenAIKeyHint: [EN] Your OpenAI API key for transcription and image generation. Get one at platform.openai.com
Settings.KankaTokenHint: [EN] Your Kanka personal access token. Generate at app.kanka.io/settings/api
Settings.KankaCampaignHint: [EN] The numeric ID of your Kanka campaign (found in the campaign URL)
Settings.LanguageHint: Idioma para transcrição de áudio (padrão: Português)
Settings.TranscriptionModeHint: [EN] Choose between cloud API, local Whisper backend, or automatic selection
Settings.TranscriptionModeAuto: [EN] Auto (try local first, fallback to API)
Settings.WhisperBackendUrlHint: [EN] URL of your local whisper.cpp server (default: http://localhost:8080)
Settings.ShowTranscriptionModeIndicatorHint: [EN] Display the current transcription mode in the recorder UI
Settings.AudioSourceHint: [EN] Choose where to capture audio from during recording
Settings.AudioSourceAuto: [EN] Automatic (try Foundry VTT first, then microphone)
Settings.EchoCancellationHint: [EN] Enable echo cancellation for clearer recordings
Settings.NoiseSuppressionHint: [EN] Enable noise suppression to reduce background noise
Settings.ImageQualityHint: Configuração de qualidade para imagens geradas por IA (maior qualidade custa mais)
Settings.MaxImagesHint: [EN] Maximum number of AI-generated images per session (0 to disable)
Settings.AutoExtractHint: [EN] Automatically extract NPCs, locations, and items from transcriptions
Settings.ConfirmEntitiesHint: [EN] Show preview dialog before creating entities in Kanka
Settings.AutoExtractRelationshipsHint: [EN] Automatically detect relationships between entities from transcriptions
Settings.RelationshipConfidenceThresholdHint: [EN] Minimum confidence score (1-10) for detected relationships to be included
Settings.MaxRelationshipsHint: [EN] Maximum number of relationships to extract per session (0 to disable)
Settings.SpeakerLabelsHint: Enable custom name assignment to detected speakers in transcription
Settings.SpeakerLabelingHint: [EN] Assign player names to detected speaker voices
Settings.VocabularyDictionaryHint: [EN] Custom vocabulary terms for improved transcription accuracy (managed via Vocabulary UI)
Settings.ApiKeyHint: Sua chave API OpenAI. Requer uma conta com créditos (mínimo $5). Obtenha em platform.openai.com/api-keys
Settings.TranscriptionBatchDurationHint: [EN] Audio accumulation time before transcription in milliseconds (5-30 seconds). Higher values reduce API calls and improve transcription quality with longer segments
Settings.PanelPositionHint: Posição salva do painel do Mestre
Settings.SensitivityName: Sensibilidade de Detecção Fora do Tema
Settings.SensitivityHint: Quão rigorosamente detectar quando os jogadores se desviam do enredo da aventura
Settings.SpeakerLabelsHintNM: [EN] Enable custom name assignment to detected speakers in transcription
Settings.DebugModeHint: [EN] Enable detailed debug messages in the browser console. Useful for troubleshooting issues and monitoring module behavior
Settings.RulesDetectionHint: Enable automatic detection of rules questions in conversations
Settings.RulesSourceHint: Select which compendium to use for rules answers
Settings.ApiRetryEnabledHint: Tentar novamente automaticamente requisições API com recuo exponencial
Settings.ApiRetryMaxAttemptsHint: Número máximo de tentativas de repetição para requisições API falhadas (0-10)
Settings.ApiRetryBaseDelayHint: Atraso inicial em milissegundos antes da primeira tentativa de repetição
Settings.ApiRetryMaxDelayHint: Atraso máximo em milissegundos entre tentativas (limite de recuo exponencial)
Settings.ApiQueueMaxSizeHint: Número máximo de requisições API que podem ser enfileiradas simultaneamente
Settings.MultiLanguageModeHintVC: [EN] Enable transcription of multiple languages in the same session
Settings.TranscriptionBatchDurationHintVC: [EN] How often to transcribe during live mode (5-30 seconds)
Settings.OffTrackSensitivityHint: [EN] How sensitive the AI is to detecting off-track players
Settings.RulesDetectionHintVC: [EN] Detect D&D rules questions in conversation
Settings.ApiRetryMaxAttemptsHintVC: [EN] Maximum number of retry attempts for failed API requests
Settings.ApiQueueMaxSizeHintVC: [EN] Maximum number of API requests that can be queued
Settings.RAGEnabledHint: [EN] Use Retrieval-Augmented Generation to enhance AI responses with context from journals and compendiums
Settings.RAGIndexOnLoadHint: [EN] Automatically build the RAG index when VoxChronicle initializes
Settings.RAGTopResultsHint: [EN] Number of most relevant chunks to retrieve for AI context (1-20)
Settings.RAGSimilarityThresholdHint: [EN] Minimum similarity score (0-1) for retrieved chunks to be included
Settings.RAGChunkSizeHint: [EN] Size of text chunks for indexing (200-1000 characters)
Settings.RAGAutoIndexHint: [EN] Automatically rebuild RAG index when journal content changes
Settings.RAGEmbeddingModelHint: [EN] OpenAI model used for generating embeddings
Settings.RAGEmbeddingDimensionsHint: [EN] Vector dimensions (512/1024/1536). Lower is faster, higher is more accurate
Settings.RAGMaxResultsHint: [EN] Maximum number of context chunks to retrieve per query (1-20)
Settings.RAGStorageLimitHint: [EN] Maximum IndexedDB storage for vector embeddings (10-500 MB)
Settings.RAGSilenceThresholdHint: [EN] Time in milliseconds before triggering autonomous suggestion (10-120 seconds)
Settings.RAGProviderHint: [EN] Choose which RAG backend to use for knowledge retrieval
Settings.RAGFlowBaseUrlHint: [EN] URL of your RAGFlow server (e.g. http://localhost:9380)
Settings.RAGFlowApiKeyHint: [EN] API key for your RAGFlow instance (from RAGFlow admin panel)
Settings.RAGFlowModelNameHint: [EN] Name of the LLM model configured in RAGFlow (leave empty for default)

Panel.ConfirmDeleteImage: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
Panel.NoNPCDialogue: No NPC dialogue suggestions available. Dialogues will be generated when NPCs are mentioned in conversations.
Panel.SelectChapterHint: [EN] Select an adventure journal or change scene
Panel.NoSuggestionsVC: [EN] Start recording to get AI suggestions
Panel.ConfigWarning: [EN] Configure your OpenAI API key in module settings to use VoxChronicle
Panel.NoAnalytics: [EN] No analytics data available. Start a live session to track analytics.

Help.Title: [EN] VoxChronicle Help
Help.GettingStartedText:
[EN] 1. Configure your OpenAI API key and Kanka credentials in module settings.
2. Start a recording session using the record button.
3. After your session, stop the recording and transcribe it.
4. Review extracted entities and publish to Kanka.
Help.ApiKeysText: [EN] You need an OpenAI API key (for transcription and images) and a Kanka API token (for publishing). Both are required for full functionality.
Help.CostsText: [EN] OpenAI transcription costs $0.006/minute. gpt-image-1 images cost $0.02 (low), $0.04 (medium), or $0.08 (high) per image.
Help.SupportText: [EN] For issues and feature requests, please visit our GitHub repository.
